src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Add configure method to support Spring Boot's legacy parent class configuration pattern.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Added 'protected SpringApplicationBuilder configure(SpringApplicationBuilder application)' method returning application.sources(Application.class).

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Introduce a Spring bean to load and deserialize a JSON configuration file into a FormsData object.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Added 'formsProp' bean method using ObjectMapper and ClassPathResource to read 'static/data/formsdata.json'.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Clean up code by removing German-language comments from the ObjectMapper configuration.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Removed comments '// Erstelle einen SimpleFilterProvider...' and '// Baue den ObjectMapper...' from objectMapper method.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements for Java 21.
Replace manual constructor injection with Lombok @AllArgsConstructor to reduce boilerplate code.
Remove unused ResponseEntity import as the return type changed to a String redirect.
Inject FormsData and ResourceProperties to support new form data population and dynamic URL generation.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: private final FormsData formsData; private final ResourceProperties link;

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Add common attributes to the model via @ModelAttribute and explicitly in GET methods to support UI rendering.
Re-enable the actual resource creation and metadata upload calls that were previously commented out for testing.
Change the post-creation redirect to use a dynamic URL from ResourceProperties instead of a static path.
Rename javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest import to jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements for Java 21/Spring Boot 3.
Shorten the URL path for the geoSearch endpoint by removing the /researchdata prefix.
Remove the timeout and fallback error handling logic from the geoSearch method, simplifying the reactive chain.
Replace manual constructor with Lombok @AllArgsConstructor to simplify dependency injection boilerplate.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Removed explicit constructor and added @AllArgsConstructor annotation.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Inject FormsData service to provide monograph-specific configuration data to the view.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Added private final FormsData formsData field.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Inject ResourceProperties to access external URL configuration for redirects.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Added private final ResourceProperties link field.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Expose monograph data to the model for use in views via a @ModelAttribute method.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Added addCommonAttributes method that adds 'monographData' to the model.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Change success redirect to use a configurable external URL instead of a local path.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Changed return statement to use link.getFrlUrl() + 'resource/' + pid.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Clarify testing vs production code paths with comments.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Added '// prod' and '// testing' comments to PID generation and return statements.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements for Java 21/Spring Boot 3.
Replace manual constructor injection with Lombok's @AllArgsConstructor to simplify boilerplate code.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: @AllArgsConstructor ... private final FormsData formsData; private final ResourceProperties link;

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Inject common form data into the model via a @ModelAttribute method for use in views.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: @ModelAttribute public void addCommonAttributes(Model model) { model.addAttribute("researchdataData", formsData.getResearchdataData()); }

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Replace hardcoded redirect path with a configurable URL from ResourceProperties to support dynamic routing.
Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ requirements for Java 21/Spring Boot 3.
Add a new 'edition' field to the Article model to support edition metadata.
Add a new 'doi' field to the Article model to support Digital Object Identifiers.
Add a new 'urn' field to the Article model to support Uniform Resource Names.
Change the type of 'publisherVersion' from List<String> to List<SimpleObject> to support structured data.
Add a new 'nextVersion' field to the Article model to track subsequent versions.
Add a new 'previousVersion' field to the Article model to track prior versions.
Add a custom setter for 'issued' to handle polymorphic JSON input (String or List of Strings).
Add a custom setter for 'additionalMaterial' to handle polymorphic JSON input (List of Strings or List of SimpleObjects).
Restructure Monograph fields to separate Lobid (write-only) and FRL (read-only) representations for better API handling.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Renamed fields like `almaMmsId` to `almaMmsIdLobid` and added corresponding read-only lists like `almaMmsId`.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Add support for multiple DOI identifiers in the Monograph model.
Add support for parallel editions in the Monograph model.
Add support for abstract text separation between Lobid and FRL.
Add support for additional notes in the Monograph model.
Add support for containedIn relationship in the Monograph model.
Add support for contributor role in the Monograph model.
Add support for fulltext online status in the Monograph model.
Add support for publication data separation between Lobid and FRL.
Add support for license information in the Monograph model.
Add support for note and other title information in the Monograph model.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Added `private List<String> note;` and `private List<String> otherTitleInformation;`.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Add support for responsibility statement in the Monograph model.
Add support for URN identifiers in the Monograph model.
Add support for ZDB ID separation between Lobid and FRL.
Add support for HBZ ID separation between Lobid and FRL.
Remove unused or deprecated fields from the Monograph model.
Update imports to reflect new field types and removed dependencies.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Added `import de.hbz.nrw.to.science.forms.v2.model.parent.CreatorObject;` and removed unused imports like `Item` and `CatalogLink`.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Replace javax.validation import with jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ / Spring Boot 3 requirements.
Add a new 'edition' field to the Researchdata model.
Comment out the recordingCoordinates field, effectively removing it from the active model.
Change the type of associatedDataset from List<String> to List<SimpleObject> to support structured data.
Add a new 'additionalMaterial' field to the Researchdata model.
Change the type of relatedDatasets from List<String> to List<SimpleObject> to support structured data.
Remove the unused agentList field from the Contribution model class.
src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.human_impl: Removed the private List<Agent> agentList field and its @JsonProperty annotation.

src/main/java/de/hbz/nrw/to/science/form.general_idea: Comment out the 'numbering' field in the PartOf model class to disable its usage.
Reorder class fields to move startDate before location and publishedBy.
